arts.ttl: Antony & Ajax reach settlement over Man Utd transfer dispute
arts.sum: Former Ajax forward Antony contested fines of more than £300,000 which he received before joining Man Utd.

arts.ttl: Ajax release Antony statement and make feelings clear on Man Utd transfer flop
arts.sum: Antony joined Manchester United from Ajax in the summer of 2022, with fines picked up in the final days of his time in Amsterdam at the centre of a legal case in recent weeks

arts.ttl: Ajax confirms: Pasveer out of action for several weeks
arts.sum: Ajax will have to do without Remko Pasveer, the club announced this week, as the veteran stopper suffered a muscle strain against Frankfurt.
